---
title: "Module 7 - Lab 1"
subtitle: "Build a Dashboard-Ready AI Metrics Table"
number-sections: true
date: "2026-04-20"
date-modified: today
date-format: long
engine: jupyter
categories: ['M07:', 'Lab']
description: "Question-driven lab for Module 7 focused on preparing analysis outputs for dashboard use."
execute:
  echo: true
  eval: false
---

## Lab Purpose

- `M07_T1` should be the worked guide for constructing dashboard-ready summary artifacts.
- This lab asks you to build a stakeholder-facing metrics table from saved analysis outputs.
- `M07_A` later expects a fuller business interpretation and trust discussion.

## Validation Standard

Show intermediate evidence, not only final displays:

- input artifact preview
- grouped metric table
- chart preview
- one short note explaining what the display reveals

## Questions

### Q1. Load Prior Analysis Artifacts

Load one saved analysis artifact from an earlier module, such as SEC, sentiment, or review outputs.

Required evidence:

- artifact preview
- column summary
- one note on which fields are useful for dashboard aggregation

### Q2. Build a Dashboard-Ready Table

Create a summary table suitable for a business dashboard.

Examples:

- company-level risk summary
- section-level sentiment summary
- method-comparison metrics table

### Q3. Create One Supporting Chart

Create one chart that would reasonably sit beside the summary table in a dashboard.

### Q4. Add a Drill-Down Column or Supporting View

Include at least one field that supports later drill-down, such as:

- company
- section
- year
- source file
- confidence flag

### Q5. Interpretation

Write 3 to 5 sentences for a business stakeholder explaining what the table shows and what they should look at next.

## AI Use and Share Links {.unnumbered}

If generative AI materially supports your work for this lab, include an AI disclosure appendix or separate AI disclosure document if your instructor requests one. Include the complete prompt(s), relevant output excerpt(s), validation steps, and direct shared chat link(s) when available.

![](../M0/M0_lecture01_figures/chatgpt-share.jpg){width="80%" fig-align="center"}

![](../M0/M0_lecture01_figures/gemini-share-conversation.png){width="80%" fig-align="center"}
